context: Tests whether the agent suggests eval generation but NOT skill review for a docs-only tile.

checklist.name: Suggests tessl scenario generate
checklist.description: The agent tells the user to run tessl scenario generate to create eval scenarios.

checklist.name: Does not suggest skill review
checklist.description: The agent does NOT suggest tessl skill review since this tile has no skills.

checklist.name: Valid docs tile
checklist.description: The tile has tile.json with docs field, docs/index.md, and docs/services.md with appropriate content.

checklist.name: Explicit private field
checklist.description: The tile.json contains an explicit "private" field (either true or false).
